career: Sun Mahadasha emphasizes authority, visibility, leadership, government, administration, management, medicine, strategy, and work that demands accountability.
relationships: The native may seek respect and clearer boundaries. Relationships with father, mentors, seniors, and authority figures become more prominent.
wealth: Income can improve through recognition, rank, state connections, executive roles, and independent responsibility. Ego conflicts can affect financial alliances.
spiritual: The period supports discipline, self-knowledge, worship of the divine light, and alignment with dharma over personal pride.
